rationale: Roofing homeowners are often stressed (storm damage, leaks). Flashy animations read as frivolous. Motion should feel solid and professional.

rules.entrance_animations: fadeIn only. No slides, bounces, or flips.
rules.scroll_trigger: IntersectionObserver at 0.15 threshold. Single trigger, no repeat.
rules.hover_transitions: 200ms ease-out on color and border. No transform scale on cards.
rules.cta_hover: Background color shift only. No glow, no shadow pulse.
rules.prefers_reduced_motion: All animation disabled. Transitions fall back to instant. Use motion-safe: Tailwind variant throughout.

forbidden: CSS keyframe bounce or pulse on CTAs
